title: Upscaled Mekanism 32x
description: 32x Resource pack for the Mekanism mod
body:
Upscaled Mekanism 32x is a [Faithful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)-style resource pack that provides higher-resolution textures for the [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) mod. It enhances visual clarity while preserving the original style, offering a sharper and more detailed 32×32 look.


![](https://imgur.com/uQy3GnK.png) ![](https://imgur.com/A3S2R8q.png)


### **Addon Support** * Mekanism Generators * Meknaism Additions * Mekanism Tools * JEI Mekanism Multiblocks

### **Credits** * [Faithful32 Modded](https://github.com/F32Organization/Faithful32-1.12.2) - This resource pack was based on Faithful32 Modded * [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) - Some textures from this pack were based on Faithful 32x
